leadText: The Green Petal (Japanese: みどりのはなびら Green Petal) is a Key Item introduced in Generation VII. It is one of the items the player collects during Mina's trial in Pokémon Ultra Sun and Ultra Moon.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] When all seven petals are collected, Mina will combine them and make a Rainbow Flower .

sections.title: Acquisition
sections.text: Acquisition [ edit | edit source ] Games Method US UM Lush Jungle (during Mina 's trial, after defeating Mallow US / Lana UM )

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description US UM P E Sw Sh BD SP LA S V A pressed flower petal you receive from Mallow during Mina's trial. The goal is to collect seven different kinds of petals.

The goal is to collect seven different kinds of petals. Acquisition [ edit | edit source ] Games Method US UM Lush Jungle (during Mina 's trial, after defeating Mallow US / Lana UM )
